notes: PG-186 — Module Settings - Documents at /documents/document-settings. 8 bento sections (General Config, Antivirus & Security, Duplicate Detection, Required Fields, Automation, AI & Intelligence, Retention Policies, Tags) + Configuration Summary, mirroring PG-182/PG-183 bento-grid pattern. 6 new Prisma models (DocumentGeneralConfig, DocumentDuplicateRule, DocumentRequiredField, DocumentTag, DocumentAutomationSetting, DocumentRetentionPolicy), 2 migrations (initial + hardening), 6 tRPC sub-routers with tenantProcedure + ctx.prismaWithTenant. POST-INITIAL-COMPLETION AUDIT (2026-04-16): 5 findings (3 High, 2 Medium) identified and fixed: (1) assertNotDeleteGuarded re-implemented with real lookup against caseDocument.relatedCaseId/relatedContactId — throws PRECONDITION_FAILED with descriptive message; (2) duplicateRules.getAll, requiredFields.getAll, retentionPolicies.getAll now auto-seed defaults inside $transaction on first read so brand-new tenants land on populated lists, not empty states; (3) notifyOnDuplicate + notifyOnOwnerChange re-categorized as Cat-2 (consumers ship in IFC-310 / IFC-311) — UI shows them as aria-disabled with a 'Pending IFC-310/311' badge so users aren't misled; (4) tags.delete now returns the {softDeleted: true, tag} discriminator the UI expects so the toast says 'Tag deactivated' (truthful) instead of 'Tag deleted'; (5) frontend test placeholders (22 expect(true).toBe(true) calls across 8 files) replaced with real RTL assertions or honest smoke/structural tests — 0 fake-green assertions remain. Cat-1 wired-now toggles: 3 (normalizeFilename, preventDeleteIfReferenced, restrictTagCreationToAdmins). Cat-2 deferred toggles: 9 (notifyOnDuplicate, notifyOnOwnerChange + 7 AI). Test count: 67 PG-186 tests passing (49 backend + 18 frontend). Apps/api + apps/web typecheck pass. DB migrations applied (deal_settings, deal_settings_hardening, ticket_settings, ticket_settings_hardening, document_settings, document_settings_hardening, enable_rls_for_remaining_settings_tables — 7 migrations). V-8 Lighthouse deferred: page is auth-gated (requires active session), consistent with PG-183 precedent.

PG-178.description: apps/web/src/components/settings/ModuleSettingsLayout.tsx present; deprecated pattern not used — PG-186 uses direct bento layout per PG-183 pattern

PG-182.description: apps/api/src/modules/contact/contact-automation.ts shapes mirrored in document-automation.ts; DOCUMENT_TAG_COLOR_TOKENS from @intelliflow/validators used in TagsTab

PG-183.description: apps/api/src/modules/account/account-settings.router.ts used as structural template; bento grid + forwardRef TagsTab + Promise.all save/reset pattern carried forward
